lines.speaker: Antos
lines.text: Nilsal, iknami. Thank you for saving my life in that cave.

lines.speaker: Antos
lines.text: After what happened, I've decided to make some changes in my life. First up is less work. Next is more drinking!

lines.speaker: Antos
lines.text: Well, not too much more. I wouldn't want to become known for it. I just plan to relax and enjoy myself a bit more.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, I can't blame you for that. All the best.
